question: Will the total value locked (TVL) in Aerodrome Finance on Base be higher than $1.2 Billion at 10:00 AM UTC on April 9, 2026, according to DeFiLlama?
description: This market seeks to determine if the TVL in Aerodrome Finance on the Base platform will exceed $1.2 Billion at the specified date and time. The source of verification for this data will be DeFiLlama.
creator: 0x92F77d44895C22618d1515C3446a9A18559166F8

question: Will Apple announce a new dedicated AI hardware device at their next Worldwide Developers Conference (WWDC)?
description: This market predicts whether Apple will announce a new dedicated artificial intelligence hardware device during their upcoming WWDC event. A dedicated AI hardware device is defined as a new product primarily designed for AI processing tasks.
creator: 0x92F77d44895C22618d1515C3446a9A18559166F8

question: Will the Federal Reserve announce a decrease in interest rates (rate cut) at their next scheduled meeting?
description: This market resolves to 'Yes' if the Federal Reserve announces a decrease in interest rates at their next scheduled meeting. Otherwise, it resolves to 'No'.
creator: 0x92F77d44895C22618d1515C3446a9A18559166F8

question: Will the price of Ethereum (ETH) be trading above $4,200 at 12:00 PM UTC on April 20th?
description: This market resolves to 'Yes' if the price of Ethereum (ETH) is above $4,200 at exactly 12:00 PM UTC on April 20th. Otherwise, it resolves to 'No'.
creator: 0x92F77d44895C22618d1515C3446a9A18559166F8

question: Will Bitcoin’s market dominance drop below 50% by June 1st, 2026?
description: This market seeks to predict whether Bitcoin’s market dominance will fall below 50% by the specified date. Bitcoin's market dominance refers to its market capitalization as a percentage of the total cryptocurrency market capitalization.
creator: 0x92F77d44895C22618d1515C3446a9A18559166F8

question: Will the Federal Reserve announce a decrease in interest rates (rate cut) at their next scheduled meeting?

question: Will Tesla officially unveil a production-ready vehicle priced under $25,000 before July 31st, 2026?

question: Will SpaceX successfully complete a 'catch' of the Starship Upper Stage (Ship) during a flight test by the end of 2026?

creator: 0x92F77d44895C22618d1515C3446a9A18559166F8

question: Will Apple announce a standalone 'Siri AI' subscription service at WWDC 2026?
description: This market predicts whether Apple will unveil a separate subscription offering specifically for 'Siri AI' at their Worldwide Developers Conference (WWDC) in 2026. The focus is on whether there will be a distinct service announced, independent of current offerings.
creator: 0x92F77d44895C22618d1515C3446a9A18559166F8

question: Will BNB reach an all-time high by the end of 2026?
description: This market predicts whether Binance Coin (BNB) will reach a new all-time high price by the end of the year 2026. An all-time high means BNB's price surpasses its prior record peak according to publicly available data.
creator: 0x92f77d44895c22618d1515c3446a9a18559166f8
